modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Cannot send documents from ImageNow to email.

full_description_text:  
I am trying to send documents from ImageNow but it is not working. When I click the send button, nothing happens. I need to send these documents for my work, but I don't know why it doesn't work. Please help me fix this issue.
short_description: Cannot send documents from ImageNow to email.
description: I am trying to send documents from ImageNow but it is not working. When I click the send button, nothing happens. I need to send these documents for my work, but I don't know why it doesn't work. Please help me fix this issue.
